theoremName: shifted Xi diagonal de Branges inequality theorem
statement: For z in C_+ and 0<omega<1/2, shifted-Xi de Branges kernel positivity implies |Xi(z-i omega)| <= |Xi(z+i omega)|.

kernelPositivityInputStatus.label: shifted kernel positivity input
kernelPositivityInputStatus.reason: K_{E_omega}(z,z)>=0 for every z in C_+.

diagonalFormulaInputStatus.label: diagonal formula input
diagonalFormulaInputStatus.reason: K_E(z,z) has denominator 4*pi*Im z and the shifted-Xi numerator.

diagonalInequalityStatus.label: diagonal shifted-Xi inequality
diagonalInequalityStatus.reason: Since 4*pi*Im z>0, K_E(z,z)>=0 gives the stated modulus inequality.

proof: Apply positive definiteness to the one-point evaluation set {z}.
Multiply by the positive denominator 4*pi*Im z.
